title: Fix Filtered Report Count Not Updating and Add Bootstrap Badge Style
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the report count to update dynamically as I filter, and I want it styled with a Bootstrap badge for visual prominence.
description:
Two changes:

1. **Bug fix**: The report count was not updating when filters were applied. Fixed to recalculate on each filter action.
2. **Enhancement**: Apply a Bootstrap-style badge to the count number for better visual prominence. Reference implementation provided via CodePen.
acceptance_criteria: Report count updates dynamically when filters are applied or cleared
Count is displayed with a Bootstrap badge style
Badge visually matches the CodePen reference design
ux_changes: Fixed dynamic count update on filter changes; added Bootstrap badge styling to the record count display.
implementation_notes: Hooked into DataTables draw event to recalculate filtered row count. Applied Bootstrap badge CSS class to the count element.
comment_summary: Waqar implemented the badge style and dynamic count, asked about red styling for the number.
